notes: Sub 5: same mpnet pipeline as sub 3 (identity Platt, no per-subject offset) but with one additional test-time post-processing step: temperature scaling sigmoid(logit / T) where T is fitted on the cold-start hold-out (bfcl + matharena) by minimizing NLL via scipy.optimize.minimize_scalar. Hypothesis: AUC=0.63 with NLL=-0.85 (sub 3) is the textbook signature of an overconfident model on OOD data; T>1 should soften predictions toward 0.5 and recover NLL without changing rankings. Expected gain: 0.10-0.20 NLL. T value loaded from artifacts/temperature.json (also stamped here at submit time).
